name: Ghost Fairy Elfobia
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>異</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>怪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> エルフォビア
desc: Once per turn: You can reveal 1 WIND monster in your hand; until the end of your opponent's next Main Phase 1, monsters with a Level higher than the revealed monster cannot activate their effects.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can reveal 1 WIND monster in your hand; until the end of your opponent's next Main Phase 1, monsters with a Level higher than the revealed monster cannot activate their effects.
